steps.t: Find the meeting location, a tree east of Bâr Nadhron, by the Mouths of the Entwash.
You have been set upon by Variag assailants near the Mouths of the Entwash, east of Bâr Nadhron. Defeat them and do not lead them to the meeting place…
Find the meeting location, a tree east of Bâr Nadhron by the Mouths of the Entwash.
You have been set upon by more Variag assailants near the Mouths of the Entwash, east of Bâr Nadhron. Defeat them and do not lead them to the meeting …
The party is under a tree east of Bâr Nadhron by the Mouths of the Entwash. You should hear what Togbor has to say.
The party has met under a tree east of Bâr Nadhron by the Mouths of the Entwash. You should hear what Gondrad has to say.
The party has met under a tree east of Bâr Nadhron by the Mouths of the Entwash. You should hear what Togbor has to say.
